ActivateEventSource.description: Grants permission to activate partner event sources

AllowVendedLogDeliveryForResource.description: Grants permission to configure vended log delivery for EventBridge

CancelReplay.description: Grants permission to cancel a replay

CreateApiDestination.description: Grants permission to create a new api destination

CreateArchive.description: Grants permission to create a new archive

CreateConnection.description: Grants permission to create a new connection

CreateEndpoint.description: Grants permission to create an endpoint

CreateEventBus.description: Grants permission to create event buses

CreatePartnerEventSource.description: Grants permission to create partner event sources

DeactivateEventSource.description: Grants permission to deactivate event sources

DeauthorizeConnection.description: Grants permission to deauthorize a connection, deleting its stored authorization secrets

DeleteApiDestination.description: Grants permission to delete an api destination

DeleteArchive.description: Grants permission to delete an archive

DeleteConnection.description: Grants permission to delete a connection

DeleteEndpoint.description: Grants permission to delete an endpoint

DeleteEventBus.description: Grants permission to delete event buses

DeletePartnerEventSource.description: Grants permission to delete partner event sources

DescribeApiDestination.description: Grants permission to retrieve details about an api destination

DescribeArchive.description: Grants permission to retrieve details about an archive

DescribeConnection.description: Grants permission to retrieve details about a conection

DescribeEndpoint.description: Grants permission to retrieve details about an endpoint

DescribeEventBus.description: Grants permission to retrieve details about event buses

DescribeEventSource.description: Grants permission to retrieve details about event sources

DescribePartnerEventSource.description: Grants permission to retrieve details about partner event sources

DescribeReplay.description: Grants permission to retrieve the details of a replay

DescribeRule.description: Grants permission to retrieve details about rules

InvokeApiDestination.description: Grants permission to invoke an api destination

ListApiDestinations.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of api destinations

ListArchives.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of archives

ListConnections.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of connections

ListEndpoints.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of endpoints

ListEventBuses.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of the event buses in your account

ListEventSources.description: Grants permission to to retrieve a list of event sources shared with this account

ListPartnerEventSourceAccounts.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of AWS account IDs associated with an event source

ListPartnerEventSources.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list partner event sources

ListReplays.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of replays

ListRuleNamesByTarget.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of the names of the rules associated with a target

ListRules.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of the Amazon EventBridge rules in the account

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of tags associated with an Amazon EventBridge resource

ListTargetsByRule.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of targets defined for a rule

PutEvents.description: Grants permission to send custom events to Amazon EventBridge

PutPartnerEvents.description: Grants permission to sends custom events to Amazon EventBridge

PutPermission.description: Grants permission to use the PutPermission action to grants permission to another AWS account to put events to your default event bus

PutRule.description: Grants permission to create or updates rules

PutTargets.description: Grants permission to add targets to a rule

RemovePermission.description: Grants permission to revoke the permission of another AWS account to put events to your default event bus

RemoveTargets.description: Grants permission to removes targets from a rule

RetrieveConnectionCredentials.description: Grants permission to retrieve credentials from a connection

StartReplay.description: Grants permission to start a replay of an archive

TagResource.description: Grants permission to add a tag to an Amazon EventBridge resource

TestEventPattern.description: Grants permission to test whether an event pattern matches the provided event

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to remove a tag from an Amazon EventBridge resource

UpdateApiDestination.description: Grants permission to update an api destination

UpdateArchive.description: Grants permission to update an archive

UpdateConnection.description: Grants permission to update a connection

UpdateEndpoint.description: Grants permission to update an endpoint

UpdateEventBus.description: Grants permission to update event buses

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the allowed set of values for each of the tags to event bus and rule actions

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by tag-value associated with the resource to event bus and rule actions

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the tags in the request to event bus and rule actions

events:EventBusArn.description: Filters access by the ARN of the event buses that can be associated with an endpoint to CreateEndpoint and UpdateEndpoint actions

events:ManagedBy.description: Filters access by AWS services. If a rule is created by an AWS service on your behalf, the value is the principal name of the service that created the rule

events:TargetArn.description: Filters access by the ARN of a target that can be put to a rule to PutTargets actions. TargetARN doesn't include DeadLetterConfigArn

events:creatorAccount.description: Filters access by the account the rule was created in to rule actions

events:detail-type.description: Filters access by the literal string of the detail-type of the event to PutEvents and PutRule actions

events:detail.eventTypeCode.description: Filters access by the literal string for the detail.eventTypeCode field of the event to PutRule actions

events:detail.service.description: Filters access by the literal string for the detail.service field of the event to PutRule actions

events:detail.userIdentity.principalId.description: Filters access by the literal string for the detail.useridentity.principalid field of the event to PutRule actions

events:eventBusInvocation.description: Filters access by whether the event was generated via API or cross-account bus invocation to PutEvents actions

events:source.description: Filters access by the AWS service or AWS partner event source that generated the event to PutEvents and PutRule actions. Matches the literal string of the source field of the event
